projectDescription: A modern 2D game engine for the web that lets you build games using JSX syntax, fine-grained reactivity, and a custom canvas runtime — no React required.
keyFeatures: JSX-based scene graph compiled directly into engine nodes — no React, no Virtual DOM
Fine-grained reactivity via useSignal and useComputed with automatic dependency tracking
Auto-computed JSX props: pass signals or functions as attributes for live canvas updates
Built-in collision system with rectangle, circle, and capsule shapes plus spatial hash broadphase
Physics simulation with gravity, rigid bodies, forces, impulses, and collision response
Camera system with zoom, smoothing, screen shake, and coordinate conversion
Sprite sheet animation with AnimationPlayer and reactive currentAnim switching
Tweening engine with 12 easing functions and sequence/parallel composition
Asset pipeline with batch loading, progress tracking, and deduplication
Audio playback via AudioPlayer node with loop, volume, and playback rate control
Input system with pointer tracking, keyboard actions, and axis helpers
Sprite filters: brightness, grayscale, modulate, contrast, opacity, hue rotation
FraxelScript API for separating game logic from rendering
Context API for cross-component value sharing without prop drilling
TypeScript-first with strict type safety throughout
publicApiSurface: createGame(jsx, root) — bootstrap and control the game
<Game width height defaultScene> — root JSX component
<collider shape group collidesWith> — collision detection node
<rigid-body mass friction bounce isStatic> — physics simulation node
<camera current zoom smoothing offset limit> — viewport control node
<audio-player soundId loop volume> — audio playback node
<clickable size onClick onMouseEnter> — pointer interaction node
<text text style> — canvas text rendering node
<geometry shape fillColor strokeColor> — primitive shape rendering node
<List array itemKey> — reactive list rendering component
useActionAxis(neg, pos) — reactive axis input hook
useClickable() — derived hook for Clickable node
useTimer() — derived hook for Timer node
useRayCast() — derived hook for RayCast node
useCollider() — derived hook for Collider node
useAnimation() — derived hook for AnimationPlayer node
useAudio() — derived hook for AudioPlayer node
useRigidBody() — derived hook for RigidBody node
useCondition(ref, onEvent, offEvent) — reactive boolean toggle hook
useWhen(signal, truthy, falsy) — signal ternary hook
loadBatch(loaders, options) — parallel batch loader with progress
animationFromSheet(sprite, texture, options) — create animation from sprite sheet
keyframesFromSheet / kfFromProp / multiKF — low-level animation keyframe builders
shapes.rectangle / shapes.circle / shapes.capsule — collision shape factory
bounds(x, y, w, h) — axis-aligned bounding box
FraxelScript<NodeType> — base class for node-attached game logic scripts
